REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-21-2018 IN DEPT. 624 - THE COURT FINDS FOR THE PLAINTIFF. JUDGMENT IS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ALI YALDIZ IN THE AMOUNT OF $84,745.34, PLUS REASONABLE FEES TO BE DETERMINED AND STATUTORY COSTS. JUDGE: ANGELA BRADSTREET; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D624).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANCILLA, CARLOS AJIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEVAL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PARK GYROS YALDIZ, ALI AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PARK GYROS $66,111.80 PRINCIPAL, $18,633.54 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $84,745.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS FOR DETAILS. THE COURT ISSUES THIS AMENDED JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR TO ADD "DBA PARK GYROS."

NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS HEVAL, INC., DBA PARK CYROS, OR ALI YALDIZ, DBA PARK GYROS. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF TO CARLOS AJIN MANCILLA TO ASSIST HIM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON MAY 22ND. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MITCH L. LYON, CSR #6840.
